name: Orbit Community Growth API
what_it_does: Community intelligence platform with REST API — tracking developer community members across GitHub, Discord, Slack, Twitter, and forums with activity scoring (Orbit Model), enabling DevRel and community teams to identify active contributors and measure community health.
use_cases: Syncing community member activity from GitHub, Discord, Slack via REST API
Querying community member orbit levels and activity for DevRel outreach
Creating custom activities for community events and contributions via API
Analyzing community growth trends and member engagement via reporting API
Integrating Orbit community data with CRM for developer-led growth workflows
not_for: General CRM or customer success (Orbit is for community/DevRel)
Social media marketing automation (Orbit is for community intelligence, not scheduling)
best_when: A DevRel or community team wants unified view of developer community health across platforms (GitHub, Discord, Slack) with API integration for developer-led growth workflows.
avoid_when: You need general CRM, social media scheduling, or aren't running an open-source or developer community.

auth.notes: API token from Orbit workspace settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Webhook for member activity events. SDK available for Ruby, JavaScript, Python.

pricing.notes: Free tier for small communities. Per-workspace pricing. US-based company. Founded 2019 by Patrick Woods and Bex Huff. Backed by Matrix Partners. Orbit Model (open-source framework) for community measurement. GitHub, Discord, Slack, Twitter, YouTube integrations. Used by thousands of open-source projects.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for members, activities, notes, and reports. Bearer token auth. Webhook for activity events. Good documentation. SDKs for Ruby, JS, Python. Rate limit (100/min) documented. Orbit Model levels (1-4) for member scoring. Clean API design with predictable patterns.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Member upsert by identity idempotent. Activity creation idempotent with same key. Report queries idempotent. Note creation creates new notes.
known_agent_gotchas: 100 requests/minute rate limit — important for bulk data ingestion
Member identity across platforms (GitHub username vs email) requires careful deduplication
Orbit Model levels (1-4) are derived — understand calculation before filtering
GDPR — community member PII requires careful handling for EU members

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. No OAuth2 scopes. Community member PII handled per GDPR. Open-source Orbit Model framework. Standard SaaS security for community intelligence platform.
